instruction:
[BUG] Moments/covariance/allow single factor models

<!--
Welcome to skfolio, and thanks for contributing!
-->

#### Reference Issues/PRs
Fixes #187 


#### What does this implement/fix? Explain your changes.
Uses the same "fix" as `EmpiricalCovariance` in scikit-learn by casting the resulting covariance matrix to an array if the number of dimensions are 0.

#### Does your contribution introduce a new dependency? If yes, which one?

No.

#### What should a reviewer concentrate their feedback on?

Nothing special, small PR.

#### Did you add any tests for the change?

Yes, perhaps should add corresponding test for other risk models (or parameterize the testing suite).

#### Any other comments?
Added a Makefile for easier running of formatting and testing, not sure if appreciated, but I find it easier to reference that rather than README, and can be used in CI.

#### PR checklist
<!--
Please go through the checklist below. Please feel free to remove points if they are not applicable.
-->

##### For all contributions
- [x] The PR title starts with either [ENH], [MNT], [DOC], or [BUG]. [BUG] - bugfix, [MNT] - CI, test framework, [ENH] - adding or improving code, [DOC] - writing or improving documentation or docstrings.

##### For new estimators
- [-] I've added the estimator to the API reference in `docs/api.rst`.
- [-] I've added one or more illustrative usage examples to the docstring and the `examples` section.

<!--
Thanks for contributing!
-->
gold_patch:
diff --git a/Makefile b/Makefile
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..ba9ea5a4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/Makefile
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+.PHONY: pip-format-and-lint pip-test uv-format-and-lint uv-test
+
+pip-format-and-lint:
+	ruff check --fix
+	ruff format
+
+pip-test:
+	pytest
+
+uv-format-and-lint:
+	uv run ruff check --fix
+	uv run ruff format
+
+uv-test:
+	uv run pytest
diff --git a/src/skfolio/moments/covariance/_empirical_covariance.py b/src/skfolio/moments/covariance/_empirical_covariance.py
index bd47dfa9..67c0ceb3 100644
--- a/src/skfolio/moments/covariance/_empirical_covariance.py
+++ b/src/skfolio/moments/covariance/_empirical_covariance.py
@@ -96,6 +96,10 @@ def fit(self, X: npt.ArrayLike, y=None) -> "EmpiricalCovariance":
         X = skv.validate_data(self, X)
         if self.window_size is not None:
             X = X[-int(self.window_size) :]
-        covariance = np.cov(X.T, ddof=self.ddof)
+        covariance = np.cov(X, ddof=self.ddof, rowvar=False)
+
+        if covariance.ndim == 0:
+            covariance = covariance.reshape(1, 1)
+
         self._set_covariance(covariance)
         return self
test_patch:
diff --git a/tests/test_moment/test_covariance/test_covariance.py b/tests/test_moment/test_covariance/test_covariance.py
index d35e1f10..1bc0187a 100644
--- a/tests/test_moment/test_covariance/test_covariance.py
+++ b/tests/test_moment/test_covariance/test_covariance.py
@@ -23,6 +23,17 @@ def test_empirical_covariance(self, X):
         assert model.covariance_.shape == (20, 20)
         np.testing.assert_almost_equal(model.covariance_, np.cov(X.T))
 
+    def test_empirical_covariance_single(self, X):
+        model = EmpiricalCovariance()
+
+        X_truncated = X.iloc[:, :1]
+        model.fit(X_truncated)
+
+        assert model.covariance_.shape == (1, 1)
+        np.testing.assert_almost_equal(
+            model.covariance_, np.cov(X_truncated, rowvar=False)
+        )
+
 
 class TestEWCovariance:
     def test_ew_covariance(self, X):
